title: Biomes
description:
This mod adds new biomes, dimensions, blocks, items and weapons.
This mod has localization in Russian and English.
body:
# What is doing this mod? 🔧
This mod adds biomes, blocks, items, weapons, etc.
This mod is better used for survival in multiplayer, because the
effect of exploration will be greater.
# What biomes adds this mod? 🌳
This mod adds **Tropical Oak Forest**; ![ ](https://i.imgur.com/LnIIYYK.png)
**Cherry Long Tree Forest**; ![](https://i.imgur.com/RQJ7T1z.png)
**Amethyst Wastelands**; ![ ](https://i.imgur.com/EZaoiuk.jpeg)
**And more!**
# What items adds this mod? 🪨
This mod adds bookshelf, paper, hammers, ramen and more! **Pictures in the gallary**
# What doing if you found issue? Want to download source code? ❓
You can report an issue on our [Github](https://github.com/feilka/biomes/issues), also you can download source code [here](https://github.com/feilka/biomes).
